name: Tiny
description: My enemies break upon me like surf upon the stone.

abilities.name: Insurmountable
abilities.description: Grants bonus status resistance and bonus slow resistance per current Strength. Total Str to Status Resist Factor: 0.1. Total Str to Slow Resist Factor: 0.2.

abilities.name: Avalanche
abilities.description: Stuns and deals damage over time to enemy units within the radius. Cast Range: 600. Effect Radius: 325/340/355/370. Number of Damage Instances: 5. Instances Interval: 0.3. Total Damage: 100/190/280/370 (190/280/370/460). Stun Duration: 1.5. Cooldown: 23/20/17/14. Mana Cost: 95/110/125/140.

abilities.name: Toss
abilities.description: Toss damage is less effective on buildings. Grants flat bonus Toss spell damage per Grow level. Cast Range: 800/900/1000/1100. Grab Radius: 300. Damage Radius: 275. Damage: 90/180/270/360. Toss Duration: 1.25. Damage Factor: 0.33. Cooldown: 20/17/14/11. Mana Cost: 110/125/140/155.

abilities.name: Tree Grab
abilities.description: Wields a tree as a weapon for a limited number of attacks. Grants Tiny bonus attack range, and a pseudo-cleave attack effect until the tree is thrown. Wielding the tree grants a flat attack damage bonus while attacking enemy units. Cast Range: 165. Area Damage Length: 400. Area Damage Radius: 200. Number of Attacks: 5. Set Base Attack Range: 300. Attack Damage to Area Damage Factor: 0.7/0.8/0.9/1 Buff Duration:. Cooldown: 22/19/16/13. Mana Cost: 40.

abilities.name: Tree Volley
abilities.description: Tiny channels to throw random trees within the radius towards the area-targeted location. Deals damage correspondingly to Tiny's attack damage upon per tree impact while applying various attack effects. Cast Range: 1200. Tree Search Radius: 700. Damage Radius: 400. Max Channel Time: 2.5. Instant Attack Factor: 1. Move Speed Slow: 25%. Mana Cost: 17.

abilities.name: Grow
abilities.description: Gains craggy mass, increasing his attack damage, and armor while slowing his total attack speed. Grants flat bonus Toss spell damage per level. Base Attack Damage Bonus: 55/110/165. Armor Bonus: 5/10/15. Move Speed Bonus: 10/15/20. Total Attack Speed Factor: 0.65 (0.73). Toss Damage Bonus: 50/175/300.
